summary: Comprehensive testing of Washingo MVP completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows tested and working. Fixed 1 critical syntax error blocking frontend load. All features from testing request verified working.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' and 'shadow* style props are deprecated'. These are React Native web compatibility warnings, not breaking issues.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend code quality: Excellent - proper async/await, MongoDB ObjectId excluded, commission calculation correct (15%)
Frontend code quality: Good - proper React Native components, all interactive elements have testID attributes
API integration: Working correctly - frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env
Services API returns correct data: 4 services with prices ₹99, ₹149, ₹299, ₹399
Commission calculation verified: 15% commission, 85% worker amount
Razorpay integration: Order creation working, returns correct order_id and key_id
Admin authentication: Working with correct credentials from .env
Admin dashboard: Returns all required stats (customers, cleaners, centres, bookings, revenue, commission)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup. Phone numbers: 9999999999, 8888888888, 7777777777, 6666666666, 5555555555, 4444444444
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Frontend was blocked by syntax error in cleaner/dashboard.tsx which has been fixed. Backend APIs all working correctly. Test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md are accurate. OTP mock (123456) working as expected.
rca_of_issue: Syntax Error in cleaner/dashboard.tsx: Line 129 had 'thumbColor:' (object property syntax) instead of 'thumbColor=' (JSX prop syntax). This caused Metro bundler to fail compilation, blocking entire frontend from loading. Root cause: Likely copy-paste error or typo during development. Fix applied: Changed colon to equals sign. Verification: Frontend now loads successfully and all navigation works.
